title: AI tool that reads your face could help doctors predict cancer survival, study finds
description: Scientists have developed an artificial intelligence tool that analyses changes in a person’s facial appearance over time to predict cancer outcomes.
content:
The face is the mirror of the mind. It shows not just our emotions but the passage of time itself, and, it turns out, the state of health.

title: AI deepfakes are circulating in our schools. What's the right way to handle them?
description: Deepfake content, made from artificial intelligence, is increasingly circulating in schools. But what can parents do if their children are the target?
content:
